UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARZ, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUCCINELLI, GARY $4,421.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,270.99 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,721.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SCHWARZ, WILLIAM ASSIGNED TO HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES THE COURT WITH A NEW ADDRESS FOR THE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARZ, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUCCINELLI, GARY $4,345.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,421.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5445.00 AND CREDITS DEFENDANT $1100.00 FOR HIS PREVIOUS DEPOSIT. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
